2026-06-02PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Ontario Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaAppointment of Susy Kim of Toronto, Ontario, to be a part-time member of the Ontario Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective September 7, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Ontario Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Appointment of Susy Kim of Toronto, Ontario, to be a part-time member of the Ontario Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective September 7, 2026.
